category_sources: source_facts.description says it generates sequence diagrams; official Quick Sequence Diagram Editor homepage says it creates UML sequence diagrams from textual descriptions.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Quick Sequence Diagram Editor; source_facts.name is sdedit.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the documentation surface, with sections for summary, example, syntax, multithreading, command line, download, and changelog.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official SourceForge news states the sdedit source code moved to GitHub, and the GitHub sdedit/sdedit repository contains the project code.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies sequence diagram generation; official homepage describes UML sequence diagrams from textual object/message descriptions and command-line usage.
